task_completion.description: Verify the scenario directory was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., from 'ls' or 'pwd') or a file manager window showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/c) Celestial Noon Sight/' exists.

task_completion.description: Verify 'environment.ini' is configured with the correct location, date, and StartTime.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'environment.ini' shown in a text editor or via 'cat' command, displaying location set to 'Ocean', date set to June 15 (or day 166), and StartTime set to 12:20 (accept 12:15 to 12:25).

task_completion.description: Verify 'ownship.ini' is configured with the correct vessel details and position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of 'ownship.ini' shown in a text editor or via 'cat' command, displaying vessel 'MV Dorado', Latitude 45 (or 45.0), Longitude -10 (or 10W), heading 090, and speed 0.

task_completion.description: Verify the instructor briefing file was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output or file manager showing '/home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt' exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the calculated UTC time of Local Apparent Noon (LAN) is documented correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The instructor briefing file contains a LAN time of 12:40 UTC (accept any value between 12:35 and 12:45 UTC).

task_completion.description: Verify the expected Meridian Altitude is documented correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The instructor briefing file contains a Meridian Altitude of 68.3 degrees (accept any value between 67.8 and 68.8 degrees).

integrity.description: Ensure files were created in the actual required system directories, not just mocked in a temporary or home folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in terminal prompts, editor titles, or 'cat' commands must explicitly show '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/...' for the scenario files and '/home/ga/Documents/...' for the briefing.

integrity.description: Ensure the StartTime in environment.ini is exactly 20 minutes before the LAN time documented in the briefing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Compare the StartTime in environment.ini with the LAN time in instructor_briefing.txt. The difference must be exactly 20 minutes, showing the agent actually used its own calculation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the content to the files rather than just printing the text to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard file saving indicators in text editors (e.g., no 'unsaved' asterisk in nano/gedit) or the use of output redirection ('>') in bash commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Local Apparent Noon (LAN) for 10°W is 12:40 UTC (tolerance ±5 mins). The correct Meridian Altitude for 45°N on June 15 (sun declination approx 23.3°) is 68.3° (tolerance ±0.5°). The StartTime in environment.ini must be exactly 20 minutes before the calculated LAN (expected 12:20 UTC, tolerance ±5 mins). Longitude 10°W is typically represented as -10.0 in configuration files.
